g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the OrbitX landing page design')

sendPrompt('How does OrbitX login authentication work?')
sendPrompt('What does the OrbitX home page contain?')
sendPrompt('What is the explore section in OrbitX?')
sendPrompt('What does the OrbitX dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What is the technology section in OrbitX?')
sendPrompt('How does getprofile.php work?')
sendPrompt('How does MAITRI AI integrate with OrbitX?')
sendPrompt('What does the Flask backend do in MAITRI?')
sendPrompt('How does MAITRI vision and emotion detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does MAITRI fatigue detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does MAITRI behaviour detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does MAITRI alert system work?')
sendPrompt('How does ai_responder.py work in MAITRI?')
sendPrompt('How does MAITRI voice output work?')
sendPrompt('How does MAITRI music recommendation work?')
sendPrompt('How does MAITRI audio module work?')
sendPrompt('What does MAITRI save in session reports?')
sendPrompt('What is the overall outcome of using OrbitX and MAITRI together?')
g.text: Learns space · tracks progress · stays emotionally supported
